title: 10 best herbal creams for upper abdominal pain
description: Foeniculum vulgare, also known as fennel, creams helps with upper abdominal pain because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The anethole compound present in fennel has a soothing effect on the digestive system, reducing cramps and discomfort associated with bloating and gas. It also relaxes the smooth muscles in the digestive tract, promoting digestion and relieving spasms that can cause upper abdominal pain. Regular application of fennel cream may help alle...
